refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall optimize the energy-per-ton ratio (energy_used / ton_moved) to remain ≤ E_target through real-time power management and load-sensing feedback.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is a high-level KPI; refinement is needed to specify the mechanism of control (power vs. load) to make it engineering-verifiable.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Field test measuring total fuel/electricity consumption against payload weight over a standard 8-hour shift cycle.
sub_frs: Adjust powertrain output based on load demand

coupling_check.notes: The DP must ensure that energy optimization does not starve safety-critical hydraulic or braking systems.

assumptions_risks: Assumes sensors provide accurate payload data in real-time
Risk of latency between load sensing and power adjustment
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Integrate a safety-priority buffer in the power allocation logic.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: On-board hardware and software controllers responsible for physical movement and energy conversion.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Reporting energy_per_ton metrics to site management.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receiving target efficiency parameters and work orders.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary location for engine/motor control and load sensors.
Too broad; encompasses off-board systems not involved in real-time control.
Only influences efficiency via operator input, not core logic.
Constraint provider, not a realization module for efficiency.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The Vehicle module is the most cohesive location because it co-locates the actuators (powertrain) with the sensors (load cells).
containment_risks: Algorithm might require cloud-based fleet data which sits outside the Vehicle IM.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure the Telemetry interface supports high-frequency data for off-board analysis.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The DPLM algorithm directly addresses the energy/ton ratio by modulating the 'energy_used' variable.

diffusion_risks: Logic diffusion if efficiency targets are also managed by Teleoperation.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle IM provides the necessary low-latency environment for the DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: High; vehicle-level sensors can validate the FR.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear; the vehicle is the physical entity consuming energy.

recommended_revisions: Define specific data packets for the Telemetry interface to support KPI tracking.

decision.justification: The high-level FR and DP are validated and assigned to the Vehicle IM. Decomposition to sub-FRs is required to define specific sensor and control requirements.

assumptions: E_target is static for the duration of a shift.
open_risks: Sensor degradation in harsh environments affecting load accuracy.
